name: mock-server-ai
description: Create mock API endpoint definitions with generated test data. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: create_endpoint
tools.description: Create a mock API endpoint definition. Provide response_schema as JSON object mapping field names to types (e.g. {"name": "string", "age": "int"}).

tools.name: list_endpoints
tools.description: List all registered mock API endpoints.

tools.name: generate_mock_data
tools.description: Generate mock data from a JSON schema. Schema maps field names to types: string, int, float, bool, date, uuid, email, array.

tools.name: validate_schema
tools.description: Validate a data object against a schema definition. Reports missing fields, type mismatches, and extra fields.
